raw_consumer_statement: Citi Bank is not allowing me to dispute charges on my credit card. Their online interface for disputes says that it is temporarily down. However, after waiting months, it does not change. I was told that I could instead call. However, when I call, I am not helped and instead passed back and forth between the fraud department and disputes department. When I send mail, I am told that my disputes are too old and I did not contact Citi soon enough, even though I had tried to have these disputes initiated within XXXX  months.
